title: Senior Backend Engineer
description: Join our engineering team to design and build high-concurrency systems handling thousands of transactions per second. You'll work on open-payment protocols and scalable backend architectures.
requirements: Expert in distributed systems and microservices
Strong knowledge of TypeScript, Node.js, or Go

title: Frontend Engineer
description: Build responsive, performant web applications using modern frameworks. You'll collaborate with designers and backend engineers to create seamless user experiences.
requirements: Strong CSS and responsive design skills

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Design and maintain cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and monitoring systems. Ensure our systems scale reliably under high load.

title: Technical Project Manager
description: Lead cross-functional teams to deliver complex technical projects. You'll bridge the gap between business requirements and engineering execution.
requirements: Strong technical background to understand engineering challenges

title: Security Engineer
description: Ensure the security of our systems and data. You'll conduct security audits, implement security controls, and respond to security incidents.
requirements: Expert in application security and penetration testing

title: Data Engineer
description: Build and maintain data pipelines that power our analytics and machine learning initiatives. Work with large-scale data processing frameworks.
